name: Novamind Inc.
summary: Hinterland Metals Inc. builds a network of clinics, retreats, and research sites to serve the regulated psychedelics industry in the United States. It operates in two segments, Cedar Psychiatry and Cedar Research. The company offers outpatient mental health services; and manages and hosts third party clinical trials and participates in institutional review board studies. It also provides ketamine-assisted psychotherapy and other therapies; retreat network services; and clinical research for psychedelic medicines. The company is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
